title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
Wishing you Happy Holidays & a Happy New Year! As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. 2024 Realities , Choppy Waters Ahead , Free Trade Area , Trump's Wall of Tariffs , and more.
